islands.name: Harbor Haven
islands.description: Castle Grounds — walk with Coin Bag, talk to Piggy Penny, style at the Outfitter, peek Capsules, then board your carpet for the first painting.

learning_objectives: Orient to Harbor as home base
Meet the Harbor Keeper and Coin Bag
Practice a tiny spend before voyaging
provenance.originality_notes: SM64-style Castle Grounds hub. Not a chapter island — chapters live on outer paintings (Coincraft Cove first).

areas.name: Main Plaza
areas.description: Outfitter, Capsules, Arcade, and Piggy Penny’s welcome mat.

areas.name: Carpet Dock
areas.description: Your money magic carpet waits to float to the Fortune Archipelago.
